headline: Ingersoll Rand Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: DAVIDSON, N.C., April 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE: IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and life science and industrial solutions, will issue its first quarter 2026 earnings release after the market closes on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. Ingersoll Rand will also host a live earnings conference call to discuss the first quarter results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 8 a.m. Eastern Time. To participate in the call, please dial +1-888-330-3073, domestica
